name: Lobster Mac and Cheese

ingredients.item: lobster tails, split in half lengthwise and deveined

method: Coat two gratin dishes with non-stick spray
Heat the oil in a skillet and brown the lobster tails for 2 minutes on medium heat.
Let the lobsters cool and separate the meat from the shells.
Chop the meat and discard the shells.
Use the same skillet to melt the butter.
Create a roux by stirring in the flour and continue stirring for 1 minute.
Pour in the half and half and milk and continue stirring for 3 minutes.
Let the liquid simmer and add the paprika, chili powder, salt, and Worcestershire Sauce.
Add the cheddar and Gruyere cheeses and stir for 5 minutes, until the cheese is melted.
Add the macaroni to the cheese sauce and gently stir in the lobster chunks.
Fill both gratin dishes with the mac and cheese mixture.
Combine the Panko, melted butter, and parmesan cheese in a bowl.
Drizzle the mixture over the mac and cheese.
Bake the mac and cheese for 15 minutes.
